title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Mamaearth - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Mamaearth - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Mamaearth! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Mamaearth:
Mamaearth is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mamaearth!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
